title: GCA’s Annual Conference pushes Code compliance
body: "The Adjudicator, Mark White, explained how he is pushing for further improvements in compliance with the Groceries Code, reducing delays in payment and ensuring the retailers treat suppliers fairly when de-listing and forecasting. He explained his work with the retailers to improve buyer behaviour, manage cost price pressures and ensure effective communication of change programmes.  Suppliers heard that the GCA and the retailers want to work with them to resolve Code issues. The GCA and the retailers’ Code Compliance Officers maintain confidentiality and ensure there are no negative consequences for speaking up. You can find CCO contact details on the GCA website.  The Conference also featured:   Insight into suppliers’ issues from the 2025 GCA annual survey and deep dive interviews.  Download the YouGov presentation slides.  (PDF, 982 KB, 30 pages)  Discussions about key issues facing the sector and improved retailer treatment of suppliers.   Further information   If you would like to confidentially contact the GCA, please email enquiries@groceriescode.gov.uk or report issues anonymously via telltheGCA.co.uk. Sign up to the GCA newsletter.  "
